mapper.insert:
insert into sys_ai_schedule(store_id, store_name, date, time_slot, employee_name, position, workload, status, ai_suggestion, create_time) values
(#{item.storeId}, #{item.storeName}, #{item.date}, #{item.timeSlot}, #{item.employeeName}, #{item.position}, #{item.workload}, #{item.status}, #{item.aiSuggestion}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from sys_ai_schedule where store_id = #{storeId} and date = #{date} order by time_slot
select * from sys_ai_schedule where store_id = #{storeId} order by date desc, time_slot limit 50
mapper.update: update sys_ai_schedule set employee_name = #{employeeName}, position = #{position}, workload = #{workload}, ai_suggestion = #{aiSuggestion}, status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_ai_recommendation(player_id, player_name, player_phone, rec_type, rec_content, rec_reason, status, expire_time, create_time) values
(#{item.playerId}, #{item.playerName}, #{item.playerPhone}, #{item.recType}, #{item.recContent}, #{item.recReason}, #{item.status}, #{item.expireTime}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from sys_ai_recommendation where player_id = #{playerId} and status = '0' order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_ai_chat(player_id, player_name, player_phone, user_input, ai_response, intent, chat_type, create_time) values(#{playerId}, #{playerName}, #{playerPhone}, #{userInput}, #{aiResponse}, #{intent}, #{chatType}, sysdate())
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_reservation WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND order_status = '3') as completedOrders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_consume WHERE store_id = #{storeId}) as totalConsumes, (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM sys_consume WHERE store_id = #{storeId}) as totalRevenue, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_id) FROM sys_consume WHERE store_id = #{storeId}) as activePlayers
